parameters.query:
SELECT id, opp_title, agency, dept, naics_code, set_aside, estimated_value,
  solicitation_number, response_deadline, place_of_performance, data_source,
  stage, gda_score, gda_label
FROM gda_opportunity_tracker
WHERE (ai_analysis IS NULL OR ai_analysis = '' OR gda_score IS NULL OR gda_score = 0)
  AND opp_title IS NOT NULL AND opp_title != ''
  AND stage NOT IN ('Won', 'Lost', 'No-Bid', 'Cancelled', 'No-Go')
  AND (naics_code IS NULL OR naics_code SIMILAR TO '(541|517|518|561|611)%')
ORDER BY estimated_value DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 10

UPDATE gda_opportunity_tracker SET
  gda_score = ({{ (function() { try { var r = JSON.parse(($input.first().json.content ? $input.first().json.content[0].text : '{}').replace(/```json\n?|```/g,'').trim()); return r.gda_score || 0; } catch(e) { return 0; } })() }})::int,
  gda_label = '{{ (function() { try { var r = JSON.parse(($input.first().json.content ? $input.first().json.content[0].text : '{}').replace(/```json\n?|```/g,'').trim()); return (r.gda_label || 'MONITOR').replace(/'/g,"''"); } catch(e) { return 'MONITOR'; } })() }}',
  ai_analysis = '{{ (function() { try { var r = JSON.parse(($input.first().json.content ? $input.first().json.content[0].text : '{}').replace(/```json\n?|```/g,'').trim()); return (r.ai_analysis || '').replace(/'/g,"''").replace(/\n/g,' '); } catch(e) { return 'Parse error'; } })() }}',
  assigned_ou = '{{ (function() { try { var r = JSON.parse(($input.first().json.content ? $input.first().json.content[0].text : '{}').replace(/```json\n?|```/g,'').trim()); return (r.assigned_ou || 'Envision').replace(/'/g,"''"); } catch(e) { return 'Envision'; } })() }}',
  sb_qualified = '{{ (function() { try { var r = JSON.parse(($input.first().json.content ? $input.first().json.content[0].text : '{}').replace(/```json\n?|```/g,'').trim()); return (r.sb_qualified || 'Unknown').replace(/'/g,"''"); } catch(e) { return 'Unknown'; } })() }}',
  likely_competitors = '{{ (function() { try { var r = JSON.parse(($input.first().json.content ? $input.first().json.content[0].text : '{}').replace(/```json\n?|```/g,'').trim()); return (r.likely_competitors || '').replace(/'/g,"''"); } catch(e) { return ''; } })() }}'
WHERE id = {{ $('Build Analysis Prompt').first().json.opp_id }}
RETURNING id, opp_title, gda_score, gda_label
